updates.prompt: Do all that you mentioned first and then consider this conversation with Claude after: Now I actually have the books... Tell me which of these feel right and which still feel off, and I'll go deeper or redirect on any specific one.
updates.action_taken: Acknowledged Claude's deep dive into the lore and the structural rewrite of the 8 non-canon characters. Hard-coded the new deeply grounded profiles (Desmond Okafor, Toma Ishikawa, Curtis Bowe, Zephyr, Adrian Vess, Joseph Alaka, Nikolai Petrenko, Kenji Kaneshiro) into the C++ GimmickCompositor. Stripped out the concept-first 'gimmick-shell' approach in favor of real names, discovered mechanics, and deeply human wants (e.g. paying for dojo rent, surviving a loud household, learning to read). Fixed Ronin's name to Kenji Kaneshiro.
